title: CodexSecondOpinionReview
description: Schema for Codex's independent second-opinion on Claude's analysis. Covers presented options, recommended approaches, technical answers, and design judgments. Codex evaluates Claude's position, gives its own, and surfaces concerns Claude missed. option_assessments is populated only when Claude presented discrete options (null otherwise).

verdict.description: AGREE: Codex reaches substantively the same position as Claude. PARTIAL: same position but materially different reasoning, OR a close call between two viable positions. DISAGREE: Codex would take a different position (including 'none-of-the-above' when Claude missed a better path).

summary.description: One short paragraph: Codex's read of the situation and where it agrees / diverges from Claude's framing.

option_assessments.description: Per-option assessment when Claude presented discrete labeled options (Option A/B, Approach 1/2, etc.). null when Claude gave a single recommendation, technical answer, or design judgment without enumerating alternatives.

option_label.description: Label/identifier of the option as Claude described it (e.g. 'Option A', or the heading Claude used).

chosen_option.description: The position Codex would take: the option Codex picks (when options were enumerated), the approach/answer/judgment Codex endorses, or 'none-of-the-above' when Codex thinks Claude missed a better path. Describe specifics in 'reasoning'.

claude_pick.description: Claude's stated position: option label, recommended approach, technical answer, or 'no-recommendation' if Claude only listed alternatives without picking.

delta.description: If matches_codex is false, the substantive disagreement; null if they match.

missed_concerns.description: Trade-offs, risks, or alternatives Codex saw that Claude's analysis did not surface. Empty array if none.
